content_body: We were so happy with our stay at Bella Vista Lodge. It's everything you see and so much more. The home itself is beautiful, so tastefully decorated and well thought out. We spent long evenings in front of the outside fireplace and early mornings on the deck. The views are incredible. Sunrise colors the world and then the clouds roll over the mountain tops... every day, right in front of your eyes. This stay with you cannot be improved upon. We enjoyed ourselves so much and it was all because of the personal touches put on everything. Taylor made everything happen so smoothly. Thank you Taylor and Cabin Rentals of Georgia for a wonderful visit. We are already looking forward to our next trip and stay with you!
title: The Stay Could Not Be Improved!
